title: zieria fraseri subsp. compacta
intro: Zieria fraseri subsp. compacta, also known as Fraser's zieria compacta, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. Native to Australia, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, specifically for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Fraser's zieria compacta include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and minor injuries.
